op02:OPデモ2（17職種紹介）: op02: OP Demo 2 (Introduction to 17 Job Categories)
“我が夫よ、あなたのことは一生、\n死しても忘れることはありません。\nまたお会: "My husband, I will never forget you, not even in death. Until we meet again, goodnight."
“我が妻よ、おまえのことは私が\n死するときまで、そして死した後も\n忘れること: "My wife, I will never forget you, not until the day I die, nor even after I die. Rest in peace until we meet again."
“我が盟友よ、私は君を\n忘れることはないだろう。\nまた会う日まで、さらばだ。: "My comrade, I will never forget you. Farewell, until we meet again."
“我が親友よ、私はあなたとの\n日々を忘れません。\nまた会えることを楽しみにし:
"My dearest friend, I will never forget the days we spent together.
I look forward to seeing you again.
Goodnight."
「かけっこをがんばりなさい」(素早さ上昇): "Do your best in the race!" (Increases speed)
「毎日素振りをしなさい」(攻撃力上昇): "Practice your swing every day" (Attack power increases)
「目を大事にしなさい」(間接攻撃力上昇): "Take good care of your eyes." (Increases indirect attack power)

あり得べからざる形をした鳥獣、バジリコック。\nどこか愛嬌のある外見と裏腹に、そ:
The Basilcock is a bird-like beast with an impossible shape.
Despite its somewhat endearing appearance, its body is filled with hatred for humans, and upon finding an object of that hatred, it launches a "continuous attack," relentlessly and repeatedly attacking.
おろかで、粗野な小鬼族のなかにも、まれに、長い\n年月の経験をつむことで、強力な:
Even among the foolish and crude goblins, occasionally, after years of experience, a powerful goblin mage can emerge.
They are dangerous monsters who transform their hatred for the world into power, unleashing "area-of-effect attacks" that damage all who stand against them.
かきくけこまみむめもざじずぜぞ: ka ki ku ke ko ma mi mu me mo za ji zu ze zo
かきくけこや ゆ よ: ka ki ku ke ko ya yu yo

I will pass on this item to this companion.

Is that alright?
この仲間に技を伝授してもらいますか?: Would you like to learn some techniques from this friend?

この者に騎士団を委ねますか?: Should we entrust the Knights' Order to this person?
この部屋ではコメントを残せません。: You cannot leave comments in this room.
さまざまな生き物が、無秩序に融合したような\nおぞましい姿を持つ幻獣族、キマイラ: The Chimera, a mythical beast with a horrifying appearance as if various creatures have been chaotically fused together, is a troublesome monster that constantly unleashes "petrification attacks" and, on top of that, "purgatory flames" that burn anything in its path.
すでにそのユーザー名は使われています。\nべつのユーザー名で登録しなおしてくださ:
That username is already in use.

Please register again with a different username.
その大きく広がった鼻が不気味なオッドノーズは\n飛行獣族の中では低級な部類ですが:
The Oddnose, with its eerie, large, flared nose, is a low-ranking member of the flying beast family, but it's a troublesome enemy that occasionally unleashes "multiple-target attacks" that hit many of its allies at once.
Since it also has a relatively high HP, you should prioritize a formation that focuses on damage recovery when fighting it.
その巨体。その威圧感。\nまさに魔物の中の魔物である竜族の尖兵。\nそれが、ター:
Its massive size. Its imposing presence.

Truly the vanguard of the dragon race, the monster of all monsters.
That is the Turquoise Dragon.

Although it is a lower-ranking member of its species, the power of its "row attack," capable of uprooting even large trees with a single swift tail swing,
is certainly a threat to humans.

Its massive size. Its imposing presence.

Truly the vanguard of the dragon race, the monster of all monsters.
That is the Turquoise Dragon.

Although it is a lower-ranking member of its species, the power of its "row attack," capable of uprooting even large trees with a single swift trajectory of its tail,
is certainly a threat to humans.
それは、姿を持った「死」そのもの。\n数多くの魔物たちに君臨する魔物の王。\nそ:
It is "Death" itself, in physical form.

The king of monsters, reigning over countless other monsters.

Its blows can shatter rocks.

Its roar shakes the heavens.

However, its resurrection is not yet complete,

and it seems it is not yet able to unleash its full power.

It is "death" itself, in physical form.

The king of monsters, reigning over countless other monsters.

Its blows can shatter rocks.

Its roar shakes the heavens.

The only small blessing for humanity is that it rarely shows itself.
と呼ばれるようになりました。: It came to be called that.
ほかの仲間に伝承する: Pass it on to other members
やや上位にあたる小獣族です。\nせわしなく動く口元は常に食べられるものを探し\n:
This is a slightly higher-ranking member of the small beast family.
Its restless mouth is constantly searching for something to eat.
Anything edible will do, and humans are no exception.
Its attack power is somewhat high, so countermeasures such as providing defensive support to allies with low HP will be necessary.

Your inventory is full.

When you transfer an item, the item you previously possessed will be lost.

アグレス、それは世界を無に帰す事のみを目的に生\nまれた種族。その力は、幼生であ:
The Agres are a race born with the sole purpose of reducing the world to nothingness. Their power, even in their larval stage, is not to be underestimated.

In particular, their occasional "dimensional banishment" attack is terrifying, forcibly sending their adversaries to somewhere other than this world.
エルミ。\nその不気味な姿が半ば伝説にまでなっている魔獣族\nです。一度に繰り出:
Elmi.

A beast of the demon race whose eerie appearance has become almost legendary.
It unleashes the most attacks at once, making it the strongest of all the demon beasts.

Its name is said to mean "the one who stares at the moon."
カオスバーン。飛来する恐怖。\n陰湿で相手にしづらい飛行獣族たちのなかでも、\n:
Chaosburn. The approaching terror.

Among the insidious and difficult-to-deal-with flying beast-type creatures,
it ranks among the top and is a particularly troublesome presence.

Its power to drain the opponent's life force, its ability to withstand the first attack,
neither of these should be underestimated. Furthermore, the "multiple attacks" it occasionally unleashes are also powerful.
カキクケコマミムメモザジズゼゾ: Ka ki ku ke ko ma mi mu me mo za ji zu ze zo
カキクケコヤ ユ ヨ: Ka ki ku ke ko ya yu yo
ガルーダは、不気味な泣き声の鳥獣族です。\n攻撃力こそ低いものの、恐るべき執拗さ:
Garuda is a bird-like beast with an eerie cry.

Although its attack power is low, it relentlessly searches for its prey, humans, with terrifying persistence, and once it finds one, it doesn't give up easily. Furthermore, it occasionally unleashes "row attacks," making it a monster not to be underestimated.
グリュバン。それは、忌まわしい大空からの脅威。\n貪欲かつ獰猛な性質を持ち、その:
Gruban. It is a cursed threat from the sky.

With a greedy and ferocious nature, it attacks humans with unimaginable speed and strong vitality, despite its size. It is one of the strongest monsters, unleashing "continuous attacks" that concentrate on targeting one person, and "row attacks" that damage an entire row.
ゴブリンウォリアーは好戦的で凶暴な、小鬼族の戦\n士です。普段は群れをなして行動:
Goblin warriors are aggressive and ferocious warriors of the goblin race.
They usually act in packs, but once they spot prey, they are cowardly monsters that will attack alone to monopolize it.
Their rare "area attack" is a troublesome attack that damages everything in its path, so be careful.

Goblin warriors are warlike and ferocious warriors of the goblin race.
They usually act in packs, but once they spot prey, they are cowardly monsters that will attack alone to monopolize it.
They wield large swords swiftly and constantly unleash "multiple-target attacks."
ゴーレム山賊団の動向: The movements of the Golem Bandit Gang

タイトルへ戻りますか?: Do you want to return to the title screen?
デビルノーズはなかなかの力を秘めた飛行獣族。\nＨＰも高く回復力もあるため、長期:
Devilnose is a flying beast-type monster with considerable hidden power.

It has high HP and good regenerative abilities, so you may have to prepare for a long battle.

It also excels at "first-strike defense," which allows it to dodge the opponent's initial attack.
ドラグーン。世界の初めから存在したといわれる、\n伝説の種族。\n敵対するあらゆ:
Dragoons. A legendary race said to have existed since the beginning of the world.
A terrifying divine dragon that turns all its enemies to stone and burns them to ashes.
When you encounter them, you will feel death closer than ever before.
ドラグーン。世界の初めから存在したといわれる、\n伝説の種族。敵対するあらゆるも:
Dragoons. A legendary race said to have existed since the beginning of the world. Terrifying divine dragons that turn all their enemies to stone and burn them to ashes.
When you encounter them, you will feel death closer than ever before.
ネクロマンサーは、次元の穴から出現し、\n生きとし生きるものすべてに「死」を運ぶ:
The necromancer is a terrifying sorcerer who emerges from dimensional holes and brings "death" to all living things.
While you'd want to defeat them as quickly as possible, they are dangerous monsters that slowly close in, mitigating damage with their "first-strike defense" ability.

Necromancers are fearsome sorcerers who emerge from dimensional holes and bring "death" to all living things.
They possess a troublesome characteristic: if the battle drags on, they activate their "attack power enhancement" ability, increasing their normal attack power.
ヒュージラットは、小獣族のなかでもやや上位にあ\nたる魔物です。\nせわしなく動:
The Huge Rat is a monster that ranks somewhat higher among the small beast species.

Its restless mouth is constantly searching for something to eat. It will eat anything edible, including humans. Its occasional "multiple attack" is also something to watch out for.
ヒルジャイアントは、全身に原始的な呪術紋様を描\nいた巨人です。激しやすく、粗暴:
Hill Giants are giants with primitive magical patterns etched all over their bodies. Even among the already fierce and brutal giant race, they possess a particularly aggressive temperament.
However, they do possess some intelligence, and have a special ability to "accumulate power"—gathering strength without attacking, then unleashing it all at once in their next attack.

Hill Giants are giants with primitive magical patterns etched all over their bodies. Even among the already fierce and brutal giant race, they possess a particularly aggressive temperament.
What you should be wary of is their occasional "Furious Blow."
This attack is terrifying, dealing twice the normal damage to its opponent.
モルガロン。竜族の王者。\n即ちあらゆる魔物の王者。\n事実、最上位の魔物の一つ:
Morgaron. King of the Dragon Clan.

In other words, King of all monsters.

In fact, he is one of the highest-ranking monsters, a fearsome being possessing unparalleled power, including the ability of "Row Attack" and the magic of "Petrification Attack."
ユーザーIDをセーブしないで\nログインしますか?: Do you want to log in without saving your user ID?

下記の情報を株式会社ナムコに送信しますが、よろしいですか。\n１６歳以下のお客様:
We will send the following information to Namco Co., Ltd. Is this alright?

仲間を募集: We are looking for team members.
依頼がいっぱいです。\n断る依頼を選んでください。:
We are fully booked.

Please choose which requests to decline.
入力に問題があります。\nパスワードは4～16文字の英数字にしてください。:
There is a problem with your input.

Please enter a password that is between 4 and 16 alphanumeric characters long.
入力に問題があります。\nメールアドレスは64文字以内で、使用できる文字に\n制:
There is a problem with your input.

Email addresses must be 64 characters or less, and there are restrictions on the characters that can be used.
入力に問題があります。\nユーザーIDは7ケタの数字に、\nパスワードは4～16:
There is a problem with your input.
Your User ID must be a 7-digit number, and your Password must be 4 to 16 alphanumeric characters.
入力に問題があります。\nユーザー名は8文字以内で、使用できない文字が\nありま:
There is a problem with your input.

Your username must be 8 characters or less and contains characters that cannot be used.
入力に問題があります。\n住所は127文字以内で入力してください。:
There is a problem with your input.

Please enter your address within 127 characters.
入力に問題があります。\n名前は16文字以内で入力してください。:

Please enter your name in 16 characters or less.
入力に問題があります。\n電話番号は16ケタ以内で、使用できる文字は\n数字と「:
There is a problem with the input.

The phone number must be 16 digits or less, and the only characters allowed are numbers and the symbols "+", "-", "(", and ")".
入団を取りやめますか?: Are you going to cancel your joining the team?
入室者一覧に戻る: Return to the list of entrants
内のメモリーカード(PS2)に\nゲームの途中経過をセーブできませんが、\nこの: The game's progress cannot be saved to the internal memory card (PS2). Do you wish to proceed with the game?
凶暴極まりない巨人族の王、オーガ。\n破壊的な腕力の持ち主で、同じ魔物たちからで:
The Ogre, the king of the extremely ferocious giant race.

Possessing destructive strength, he is feared even by other monsters, and any foolish challenge will inevitably lead to a fatal outcome.

Furthermore, he is the strongest giant, possessing the ability to defend against attacks twice in a row.
凶運の翼、幻獣族ブルートキマイラ\nどこからともなく飛来し、人々を恐怖に陥れる\:
The Wings of Misfortune, the Mythical Beast Blue Chimera
A cruel monster that flies in from nowhere and terrorizes people.
It petrifies all that opposes it and burns them to death with its "Flame of Purgatory." There is no such thing as mercy or compassion in their vocabulary.
判定決着まで残り: Remaining until the decision is made
前列全員のHPを倍にする: Double the HP of all characters in the front row.
前列全員のすばやさを\n倍にする: Double the speed of everyone in the front row.
前列全員をクリティカルチャージ状態にする: Put all front row members into a critical charge state.
勝者があなたにニックネームをつけています。: The winner will give you a nickname.
命あるもの全てを食らい尽くす、貪食の抗体である\nアグレス。その成体のちからは、: Agres, the antibody of gluttony that devours all living things. Its adult form is said to be the strongest among all monsters. Its immense physical strength, "first attack" ability, and its most distinctive feature, the "dimensional pursuit" attack—all of these are powers befitting its purpose of destroying the entire world.
固く結ばれた親友がいます。: I have a very close friend.
地獄からの使者、魔獣族ケルベロス。\n一度に何度も攻撃する凶暴な魔物です。\n傷:
The Cerberus, a messenger from hell and a member of the demon beast race.

It is a ferocious monster that attacks multiple times at once.

It possesses the ability to heal its wounds and is highly intelligent, accurately discerning the true nature of its enemies.

It is an aggressive and dangerous being.

You should also be wary of its "Angry Blow," which it unleashes with all its might on a whim.
外部ネットワークに接続できませんでした。: Could not connect to the external network.
子供の入団を取りやめますか?: Will you cancel your child's enrollment?
子供を入団させました: I enrolled my child in the team.
実体らしい実体のないガス族は、魔力の塊のような\n存在です。\nその中でも上位の:
The Gas Tribe, lacking any tangible form, are beings like lumps of magical energy.
Among them, the higher-ranking Evil Clouds possess even high intelligence and are terrifying monsters that use "death curse attacks" to prevent their allies from healing while cornering them.
実体化した暗闇、死を運ぶ天使、ゾドコル。\n数ある魔物たちの中でも指折りの存在で:
Zodkor, the materialized darkness, the angel who brings death.

Among the many monsters, he is one of the most formidable beings, possessing immense magical power.

No one can resist the curse of their "petrification attack,"
and the "consecutive attacks" they occasionally unleash also possess terrifying power.
対戦が打ち切られました(タイムアウト)。: The match has been called off (timeout).
対戦結果が食い違っているため中断します。: The match is being interrupted because the results are inconsistent.
小獣族、モウリィマウスは\n常に腹を空かせていて、動くものならなんでも口\nに入:
The small beast-like Mowrymouse is a low-level monster that is always hungry and will try to eat anything that moves.
While it is relatively weak for a monster, its appearance is misleading, and you will suffer a painful blow from its first attack.
常に腹を空かせていて、動くものならなんでも口\nに入れようとする低級な小獣族です:
They are low-level small beasts that are always hungry and will try to eat anything that moves.
They seem to have slightly more HP than the monster from before, but if you rotate your formation and switch positions when they take damage, they are not an opponent to be feared.

They are low-level small beasts that are always hungry and will try to eat anything that moves.
They are weaker than most monsters, but they are quite fast, and you'll get hurt if you're not careful.
If you take damage, swap out your frontline allies and fight cautiously.
引き継がせないことにしました: I decided not to hand it over.
怨念や憎しみが形になったかのような、不気味な\n魔物、ガス族たち。\n奇怪で醜悪:
The Gas Tribe, eerie monsters that seem to embody resentment and hatred.
The bizarre and hideous Poison Mist is a troublesome monster that constantly unleashes "row attacks" filled with all its hatred.
恐るべき生命力と破壊力を持つ竜族は、その存在\n自体が魔物の代名詞とも言えます。:
The dragon race, possessing terrifying vitality and destructive power, is practically synonymous with monsters in itself.
The Crimson Dragon, with its lightning-like "row attack" ability, is fortunate to be relatively slow-moving; otherwise, humans would have had no chance.
悪魔に身も魂をもささげた背徳者。\n呪術師、ダークソーサラー。\n闇にひそみ、暗:
A depraved individual who has dedicated both body and soul to the devil.

A sorcerer, a dark sorcerer.

Lurking in the shadows and loving darkness, they occasionally reveal themselves,
and work to spread the emotion of "fear," which forms the foundation of their doctrine, throughout the world.

A depraved individual who has dedicated both body and soul to the devil.

A sorcerer, a dark sorcerer.

Lurking in the shadows and loving darkness, they occasionally reveal themselves,
and work to spread the emotion of "fear," which forms the foundation of their doctrine, throughout the world.
憎悪の塊のような種族、アグレスは、不完全体とい\nえども、強大な力を持っています:
The Agres, a race consumed by hatred, possess immense power even in their incomplete forms.
In particular, their "dimensional banishment" attack, which forcibly transports those who oppose them to another world, requires extreme caution.
戦闘中に死亡した仲間を復活させる: Revive allies who died in battle.
敵に回復不能ののろいをかける: Cast an irreversible curse on the enemy.
新入りだけど押しがつよいんだよね: She's new, but she's really assertive.
方向キー…画面移動\n△ボタン…初期状態に戻す\n○ボタン…決定\n×ボタン…キ:
Directional keys: Move screen
Triangle button: Reset to initial state
Circle button: Confirm
X button: Cancel
時計塔の麓: At the foot of the clock tower
暗闇を統べる死者の王、死神リッチ。\n時間がたてばたつほど、その攻撃は威力を増し:
The Lich, the King of the Dead who rules the darkness.

The longer time passes, the more powerful his attacks become,
and the more terror he will instill in his enemies.

While you'd want to defeat him as quickly as possible,
he has high HP and possesses the ability of "First Defense,"
making him a very troublesome monster.
有り余る力と、考えなしの行動という、迷惑な取\nり合わせを持つ、巨人族ジャイアン:
The Giants, a race of giants, possess an overwhelming amount of power and a tendency to act without thinking, making them a troublesome combination.

However, these monsters seem to be capable of some intelligence, and will concentrate their attacks on warriors who lack regenerative abilities, so be careful.

The Giants, a race of giants, possess an overwhelming combination of immense power and thoughtless actions, making them a troublesome bunch.
They view everything except monsters as enemies and are always looking to attack at the slightest opportunity.
Underestimating them because of their slow movements could lead to an unexpected blow and put you in a precarious situation.
未定義エラーです(製品版ではでないはず): This is an undefined error (it shouldn't appear in the final product).
未定義エラーです(製品版ではでないはず)。: This is an undefined error (it shouldn't appear in the final product).
正しく入力されていません。: The information is not entered correctly.
死神、アークデーモン。\n人間を倒すことに喜びを見出す残忍な悪魔。\n高い魔力に:
The Grim Reaper, the Archdemon.

A cruel demon that finds joy in defeating humans.

A terrifying being that enjoys tormenting its opponents by turning them to stone with its "petrification attack," unleashed with immense magical power.
残忍な微笑みをうかべるスカルデーモン。\n彼らは、魔物たちの中でも高い知能と魔力:
The Skull Demon wears a cruel smile.
They possess high intelligence and magical power among monsters, and many hold leadership positions over other monsters. Their power, though lower in rank, should never be underestimated.
Their constant "petrification attack" requires careful consideration of your formation to avoid unexpected defeat.
港町の酒場: A bar in a port town
災の翼と呼ばれる、魔物の４党首の一人。\nこの世に混沌と破壊をもたらすことを目論:
One of the four leaders of the monster clan known as the Wings of Calamity.
Zorud, the "Calamity of Power," aims to bring chaos and destruction to this world.
No one can resist the curse of his "petrification attack," and the "consecutive attacks" he occasionally unleashes also possess terrifying power.
災の翼と呼ばれる、魔物の４党首の一人。\n全てを憎み、全てに憤り、全てを消し去る:
One of the four leaders of the monster clan known as the Wings of Calamity.

A being who hates everything, is enraged by everything, and wants to erase everything.
"The Black Calamity" Niza.

The longer time passes, the more powerful her attacks will become,
and she will strike fear into the hearts of her enemies.
煙とも霧ともつかないガス族にも意志めいたものが\nあります。魔力と知能を駆使する:
Even the gas-like creatures, neither smoke nor mist, possess a will of their own.
Acid Smoke, who utilizes magic and intelligence, will be a formidable opponent.
They constantly unleash "row attacks," slowly cornering their allies.

Even the gas-like creatures, neither smoke nor mist, possess a will of their own.
Acid Smoke, who utilizes magic and intelligence, will be a troublesome opponent.
In particular, their "Death Curse Attack" is a terrifying attack that leaves the opponent unable to recover for a certain period of time.
狂気を宿した真紅の瞳を持つ、小鬼族ゴブリン。\n彼らの性格は、姑息で意地汚く、暗:
Goblins, small pygmy creatures with crimson eyes that harbor madness.

Their nature is cunning and greedy, and they scurry about restlessly through the dark forest, searching for prey.

They possess regenerative abilities and constantly unleash "multiple-target attacks," so underestimating them will lead to painful consequences.
生きとし生けるものすべてに、永遠の死を。\n大精霊、ザイ＝アングレア、\nもっと:
Eternal death to all living things.
The Great Spirit, Zai-Angrea,
the most wicked "creator of malevolent destruction,"
desires a re-establishment of the miracle of Anguaros,
and is the fate of the Great Spirit who sought to reduce the world to nothingness.

空き容量が985KB以上あるメモリーカード(PS2)を\n挿入してください。: Please insert a memory card (PS2) with at least 985KB of free space.

絶好調のようです。: They seem to be in top form.

Removing an equipped item will reset your experience points.

飛行獣族、オッドノーズは、その大きく広がった鼻\nに、愛嬌さえ感じさますが、決し:
The flying beast, Oddnose, may seem endearing with its large, wide nose, but you should never underestimate it.
It possesses the ability of "First Defense," which blocks the first attack, making it a formidable and defensively strong opponent.
食べ物、特に果物に異常に執着するオウルベアは、\nいつもなにかしら持ち歩いていま:
Owlbears have an unusual obsession with food, especially fruit, and always carry something with them.
Their strange behavior is unpredictable, and if you let your guard down, you'll likely suffer a painful blow with their first attack.
騎士団で最強の人物です。: He is the strongest member of the Knights.
騎士団のアイテムがいっぱいです。\nアイテムを入れ替えますか?\n※余ったアイテ:
Your Knights' inventory is full of items.

Would you like to swap some items?

*Excess items will be discarded.
魔物たちの中でもひときわ異質なエレメンタル族。\n土の属性を持つ、アースビットは:
Among the monsters, the Elemental tribe stands out as particularly unique.
Earthbit, possessing the Earth attribute, can deal double the normal damage when attacked with the "Wind" attribute.
However, allies with the "Water" attribute will take double the normal damage.
魔物たちの中でもひときわ異質なエレメンタル族。\n水の属性を持つ、アクアビットは:
Among the monsters, the Elemental tribe stands out as particularly unique.

Aquavit, possessing the water attribute, can deal double the normal damage when attacked with the "earth" attribute.

However, allies with the "fire" attribute will take double the normal damage.
魔物たちの中でもひときわ異質なエレメンタル族。\n火の属性を持つ、フレイムビット:
Among the monsters, the Elemental tribe stands out as particularly unique.

The Flame Bit, possessing the fire attribute,
can inflict double the normal damage when attacked with the "water" attribute.

However, allies with the "wind" attribute will take double the normal damage.
魔物たちの中でもひときわ異質なエレメンタル族。\n風の属性を持つ、エアビットは\:
Among the monsters, the Elemental tribe stands out as particularly unique.

Airbit, possessing the wind attribute,
can inflict double the normal damage when attacked with the "fire" attribute.

However, allies with the "earth" attribute will take double the normal damage.
魔獣族ヘルハウンドはその二つの頭で一度に何度も\n攻撃をする「複数攻撃」を常に繰:
The Hellhound, a type of demon beast, is a terrifying creature that constantly unleashes "multiple attacks," using its two heads to attack multiple times at once.

It is extremely aggressive, and even its own two heads constantly bicker due to differences in temperament.
